authoritative_references: amule-official; emule-official-0.50a; mldonkey-official; wireshark-official; protocol-docs
current_aria2_next_surface: docs/maintenance/ed2k references older disallowed projects
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Use only the current authoritative local references. Treat the older tracker as historical because its completion claim was disproven by live interoperability behavior.
user_visible_impact: Future work stops depending on stale or disallowed reference assumptions.

authoritative_references: protocol-docs ED2K client/server and client/client flow; aMule/eMule runtime behavior
current_aria2_next_surface: Draft implementation can parse links, create tasks, connect servers, discover sources, and sometimes reach peer hello/eMule-info exchange, but public peer transfer still stalls at zero bytes.
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Keep using controlled short live runs plus local peer fixtures. Treat public single-source runs as nondeterministic when LowID and stale peers prevent reaching the same packet boundary twice.
user_visible_impact: Refactor work targets observed packet boundaries instead of speculative features.

authoritative_references: aMule ED2KLink; eMule ED2KLink; protocol-docs aMule-Ed2k_link
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_link.* parses file links, names, size, MD4, part hashes, AICH, and inline sources
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Verify file link parsing and serialization for safe filenames, MD4 file hash, part hashes, AICH root, inline sources, source user hash, and source crypt options. Keep aria2-next percent-decoding and path safety stronger than legacy clients where appropriate.
user_visible_impact: Users can add file links without losing metadata or accepting unsafe output names.

authoritative_references: aMule ED2KLink; eMule ED2KLink; protocol-docs aMule-Ed2k_link
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_link.* supports server, serverlist, and nodeslist link types
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Verify server links, serverlist URLs, and nodeslist URLs. Use aria2-next request/session plumbing rather than legacy GUI prompts or auto-update dialogs.
user_visible_impact: Users can import server and Kad bootstrap data through normal aria2-next task/session paths.

authoritative_references: aMule ServerList and Server; eMule ServerListCtrl and Server; MLDonkey donkeyInteractive and donkeyServers
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_server.* parses server.met metadata into ED2K server endpoints and states
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit version handling, IP/port fields, tag parsing, duplicate server merge, unknown tags, malformed files, compressed/downloaded server.met inputs, and persistence. Adapt parser behavior to safe aria2-next inputs without implementing GUI update history.
user_visible_impact: Server lists load reliably without poisoning server state or depending on legacy UI behavior.

authoritative_references: aMule Kad contacts; eMule Kademlia routing zone; MLDonkey donkeyNodesDat and donkeyOvernet
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_kad.* and Ed2kKadState parse and persist routing snapshots
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit nodes.dat headers, contact ID/IP/UDP/TCP/version fields, Kad version variants, malformed input handling, bootstrap merge, and durable routing state. Adapt only classic Kad behavior needed by aria2-next.
user_visible_impact: Kad bootstrap data survives restart and rejects bad contacts safely.

authoritative_references: aMule ServerSocket and ServerUDPSocket; eMule ServerSocket; MLDonkey donkeyServers and donkeyProtoServer; Wireshark packet-edonkey
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kCommand server handling and ed2k_server.*
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement or correct login, IDChange, HighID/LowID, GetSources, GetSources OBFU, FoundSources, FoundSources OBFU, callback, server status, messages, server list, UDP status, and persisted server state.
user_visible_impact: Server discovery works with modern servers and does not drop valid source formats.

authoritative_references: aMule source OBFU paths; eMule source OBFU paths; Wireshark sourceOBFU dissector
current_aria2_next_surface: SourceExchangeEntry cryptOptions and server source parsing
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Represent obfuscation settings, optional user hash, direct callback bits, and crypt support/request/require flags where they affect source connection behavior. Prune only crypt behavior that is not implemented and must not be advertised.
user_visible_impact: Peers receive accurate connection options and fewer immediate disconnects.

authoritative_references: protocol-docs callback mechanism; aMule/eMule server callback handling; MLDonkey indirect address handling
current_aria2_next_surface: Server state, callback request handling, incoming peer listener
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Support HighID direct peer connections, LowID callback through shared server when possible, and safe failure handling when LowID-to-LowID transfer is impossible or unsupported.
user_visible_impact: LowID users get honest behavior and valid callback paths instead of silent stalls.

authoritative_references: aMule ClientTCPSocket and DownloadClient; eMule ListenSocket and DownloadClient; Wireshark eMule info dissector
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_peer.* and Ed2kCommand hello handling
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Parse, generate, and validate peer hello, hello answer, eMule info, misc options, misc options 2, and server endpoint fields. Advertise only implemented capabilities.
user_visible_impact: Modern peers should not reject aria2-next because it claims unsupported protocol features.

authoritative_references: aMule DownloadClient and ClientTCPSocket; eMule DownloadClient, ListenSocket, FileIdentifier; Wireshark multipacket handling
current_aria2_next_surface: Current constants and handlers do not cover the full modern request flow
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement OP_MULTIPACKET, OP_MULTIPACKET_EXT, OP_MULTIPACKET_EXT2, multipacket answer handling where required, and file identifier read/write/compare behavior adapted to aria2-next metadata.
user_visible_impact: Modern aMule/eMule peers can complete the file request handshake.

authoritative_references: eMule secure identification packets; aMule client credit and secure-ident behavior; Wireshark SEC_IDENT, PUBLIC_KEY, SIGNATURE
current_aria2_next_surface: No complete secure-ident subsystem is evident in current ED2K draft
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Either implement the secure-ident packet flow needed for advertised capabilities or stop advertising it. Prune credit-security behavior only with evidence that file transfer interoperability does not require it.
user_visible_impact: Peer trust and credit behavior remain honest and interoperable.

authoritative_references: aMule EncryptedStreamSocket and EncryptedDatagramSocket; eMule encrypted sockets; Wireshark crypt option fields
current_aria2_next_surface: Current ED2K draft records some crypt options but does not own an encrypted ED2K transport
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement only if required for practical peer/server interoperability. Otherwise parse and preserve source metadata but do not advertise crypt support as locally available.
user_visible_impact: Avoids peers selecting an encrypted path that aria2-next cannot complete.

authoritative_references: aMule DownloadClient and ClientTCPSocket; eMule DownloadClient and ListenSocket; MLDonkey donkeyClient and donkeyProtoClient
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kCommand peer path now sends extended request filename payloads when advertising extended request version 2, and accepts extended incoming file requests in shared-peer paths.
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Continue implementing file status, hashset, queue rank, accept upload, start upload, part requests, cancel, out-of-parts, no-file, disconnect, failure scoring, reconnect backoff, multipacket variants, and file identifiers in the same order and conditions as reference behavior.
user_visible_impact: Peer sessions should no longer be rejected specifically for sending a short request filename packet after advertising extended requests.

authoritative_references: aMule PartFile and KnownFile; eMule PartFile, KnownFile, FileIdentifier; protocol-docs corruption handling
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kPeerTransfer, ed2k_hash.*, ed2k_aich.*, ed2k_compression.*
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Verify normal parts, 64-bit parts, compressed parts, MD4 piece/root/final hashes, AICH root/tree/recovery data, corrupt-piece rejection, and resume safety through existing disk paths.
user_visible_impact: Downloaded data is correct and recoverable after restart.

authoritative_references: aMule PartFile source management; eMule DownloadClient and DeadSourceList; MLDonkey source handling
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_policy.* and PeerState
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Rank and retry sources from server, OBFU, inline link, Source Exchange, Kad, resume, and callback paths with queue state, availability, dead-source backoff, duplicate rejection, and endgame behavior.
user_visible_impact: Downloads use available sources efficiently without loops or unsafe duplicate writes.

authoritative_references: aMule KnownFile and PartFile Source Exchange; eMule KnownFile and PartFile Source Exchange; Wireshark eMule source packets
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_peer.* SourceExchangeEntry and merge policy
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Support SX1, SX2, SX2 v4, user hash, server endpoint, crypt options, direct callback metadata where supported, and safe merge filtering.
user_visible_impact: Peers can discover additional sources beyond servers and inline links.

authoritative_references: aMule kademlia; eMule kademlia; MLDonkey donkeyProtoKademlia and donkeyNodesDat; protocol-docs Kademlia paper and aMule Kad docs
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kKadCommand, Ed2kKadState, ed2k_kad.*
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement nodes.dat loading, bootstrap, hello, routing table, traversal, source search, source publish, keyword search, firewalled checks, refresh, and durable state. Prune obsolete Kad1 or unsupported UI behavior with evidence.
user_visible_impact: Kad discovery works without a second event loop.

authoritative_references: aMule search list; eMule SearchList; MLDonkey search; existing aria2-next RPC patterns
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_search.* and RPC methods
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Expose server and Kad search through stable CLI/RPC fields and generated ED2K links that can create normal downloads.
user_visible_impact: Motrix Next can search and start ED2K tasks reliably.

authoritative_references: aMule SharedFileList, UploadQueue, UploadClient, ClientCredits; eMule SharedFileList, UploadQueue, UploadClient; MLDonkey donkeyShare
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kSharedStore, Ed2kSharedResponder, Ed2kUploadQueue
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Completed and imported files must be indexed, hashable, shareable, and uploadable with queue ranks, slots, limits, stats, and credits integrated into aria2-next.
user_visible_impact: aria2-next behaves as a cooperative ED2K peer where supported.

authoritative_references: server.met, nodes.dat, aMule/eMule known file metadata, MLDonkey state, aria2-next session format
current_aria2_next_surface: Session serializer and hidden ED2K state options
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Persist active metadata, piece/hashset/AICH state, sources, server state, Kad routing, shared files, and peer credits in documented restart-safe formats.
user_visible_impact: ED2K tasks survive restart without corrupting normal aria2-next session behavior.

authoritative_references: aMule GUI/web/text client; eMule Windows UI; MLDonkey UI surfaces
current_aria2_next_surface: aria2-next CLI/RPC
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Prune GUI-only and daemon-shell behavior that does not implement ED2K wire interoperability.
user_visible_impact: No UI compatibility is promised beyond aria2-next CLI/RPC and Motrix Next integration fields.

authoritative_references: aMule/eMule chat, comments, preview, collection UI, shared-directory browsing UI
current_aria2_next_surface: No required aria2-next owner model
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Prune obsolete social or UI-only packet surfaces unless required for safe ignore/reject behavior.
user_visible_impact: File transfer, search, sharing, and status remain the compatibility target.
